name: S-31
events: 21 Sep 1942 S-31 fires two torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 1500 tons south of Yalta, Crimea. Both torpedoes missed their target.
22 Sep 1942 S-31 fires two torpedoes against the German barge F-359 south of Yalta, Crimea. Both torpedoes missed their target.
17 Oct 1943 S-31 fires four torpedoes against the German barge F 418 some 23 nautical miles south-west of Yevpatoriya, Crimea in position 44°59'N, 32°56'E. The torpedoes missed their target.

18 Oct 1943 S-31 fires four torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 5000 tons some 30 nautical miles south-east of Yevpatoriya, Crimea in position 44°58'N, 32°46'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
9 Dec 1943 S-31 torpedoed and sank the German barge F 580 (155 BRT) some 20 nautical miles east of Ak-Mechet, Crimea in position 45°29'N, 32°19'E.

13 Apr 1944 S-31 fires 4 torpedoes against the Romanian merchant Ardeal (5695 BRT) in the Black Sea some 105 nautical miles east-south-east of Constanta, Romania in position 43°38'N, 31°00'E. All four torpedoes missed their target.
